---
title: "04 — Final Model Evaluation"
format: html
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
root_dir <- if (file.exists("data/raw")) "." else ".."
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(root_dir))
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```



## Load trained models and preprocessing pipeline

```{r load-models}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(yardstick)
library(pROC)
library(xgboost)

models_path <- "data/processed/models.rds"
if (!file.exists(models_path)) {
  stop("Model output not found. Run R/03_modeling.qmd first.")
}

saved <- readRDS(models_path)

fit_logistic <- saved$models$logistic
fit_lasso    <- saved$models$lasso
fit_rf       <- saved$models$random_forest
fit_xgb      <- saved$models$xgboost
val_metrics_all <- saved$val_metrics
best_model_name <- saved$best_model
prep  <- saved$prep
train_ref <- saved$train_ref

cat("Best model from validation:", best_model_name, "\n")
```



## Prepare held-out test features

```{r prepare-test}
splits_path <- "data/processed/splits_caret.rds"
if (!file.exists(splits_path)) {
  stop("Splits not found. Run R/02_preprocess.qmd first.")
}
splits <- readRDS(splits_path)

prepare_features <- function(train_reference, new_data, p) {
  imputed    <- p$impute_from_train(train_reference, new_data)
  predictors <- imputed |> select(all_of(p$keep_predictors))
  features   <- as.data.frame(predict(p$dummy_vars, predictors))
  features   <- features[, p$post_dummy_cols, drop = FALSE]
  processed  <- as.data.frame(predict(p$pre_process, features))
  list(x = processed, y = imputed$readmit_30)
}

test_prep <- prepare_features(train_ref, splits$test, prep)

cat("Test observations:", nrow(test_prep$x), "\n")
cat("Features:", ncol(test_prep$x), "\n")
cat("Test readmission rate:",
    scales::percent(mean(test_prep$y == "Yes"), accuracy = 0.1), "\n")
```



## Test-set predictions for all models

```{r test-predictions}
y_test_fac <- factor(test_prep$y, levels = c("No", "Yes"))
x_test_mat <- as.matrix(test_prep$x)

prob_logistic <- predict(fit_logistic, test_prep$x, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
prob_lasso    <- predict(fit_lasso,    test_prep$x, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
prob_rf       <- predict(fit_rf,       test_prep$x, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]
prob_xgb      <- predict(fit_xgb, xgb.DMatrix(x_test_mat))

class_logistic <- predict(fit_logistic, test_prep$x)
class_lasso    <- predict(fit_lasso,    test_prep$x)
class_rf       <- predict(fit_rf,       test_prep$x)
class_xgb      <- factor(ifelse(prob_xgb >= 0.5, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No", "Yes"))
```



## ROC curves on test set

```{r roc-curves-test}
roc_logistic <- roc(y_test_fac, prob_logistic, quiet = TRUE)
roc_lasso    <- roc(y_test_fac, prob_lasso,    quiet = TRUE)
roc_rf       <- roc(y_test_fac, prob_rf,       quiet = TRUE)
roc_xgb      <- roc(y_test_fac, prob_xgb,      quiet = TRUE)

roc_df <- bind_rows(
  tibble(fpr = 1 - roc_logistic$specificities, tpr = roc_logistic$sensitivities,
         model = sprintf("Logistic (AUC=%.3f)", auc(roc_logistic))),
  tibble(fpr = 1 - roc_lasso$specificities,    tpr = roc_lasso$sensitivities,
         model = sprintf("LASSO (AUC=%.3f)",    auc(roc_lasso))),
  tibble(fpr = 1 - roc_rf$specificities,        tpr = roc_rf$sensitivities,
         model = sprintf("Random Forest (AUC=%.3f)", auc(roc_rf))),
  tibble(fpr = 1 - roc_xgb$specificities,       tpr = roc_xgb$sensitivities,
         model = sprintf("XGBoost (AUC=%.3f)",  auc(roc_xgb)))
)

p_roc_test <- ggplot(roc_df, aes(x = fpr, y = tpr, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    title = "ROC Curves — Held-Out Test Set",
    x = "False Positive Rate (1 − Specificity)",
    y = "True Positive Rate (Sensitivity)",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_roc_test)

ggsave("output/figures/15_roc_curves_test.png", p_roc_test, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
```



## Test-set performance metrics

```{r test-metrics}
compute_metrics <- function(y_true, probs, preds, model_name) {
  tibble(
    model     = model_name,
    roc_auc   = yardstick::roc_auc_vec(y_true, probs, event_level = "second"),
    sens      = yardstick::sensitivity_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second"),
    spec      = yardstick::specificity_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second"),
    precision = yardstick::precision_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second"),
    f1        = yardstick::f_meas_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second")
  ) |>
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), \(x) round(x, 4)))
}

test_metrics_all <- bind_rows(
  compute_metrics(y_test_fac, prob_logistic, class_logistic, "Logistic regression"),
  compute_metrics(y_test_fac, prob_lasso,    class_lasso,    "LASSO"),
  compute_metrics(y_test_fac, prob_rf,       class_rf,       "Random forest"),
  compute_metrics(y_test_fac, prob_xgb,      class_xgb,      "XGBoost")
) |>
  arrange(desc(roc_auc))

test_metrics_all
```



## Validation vs. test performance comparison

```{r val-vs-test}
val_long <- val_metrics_all |>
  select(model, roc_auc, sens, spec) |>
  mutate(split = "Validation")

test_long <- test_metrics_all |>
  select(model, roc_auc, sens, spec) |>
  mutate(split = "Test")

comparison <- bind_rows(val_long, test_long) |>
  pivot_longer(c(roc_auc, sens, spec), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
  mutate(
    metric = recode(metric,
      roc_auc = "ROC-AUC",
      sens    = "Sensitivity",
      spec    = "Specificity"
    )
  )

p_comparison <- ggplot(comparison, aes(x = model, y = value, fill = split)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~ metric, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Validation" = "#4C78A8", "Test" = "#E45756")) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1)) +
  labs(
    title = "Validation vs. Test Performance by Model",
    x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 20, hjust = 1),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

print(p_comparison)

ggsave("output/figures/16_val_vs_test_comparison.png", p_comparison,
       width = 8, height = 9, dpi = 150)
```



## Confusion matrices

```{r confusion-matrices}
cm_logistic <- confusionMatrix(class_logistic, y_test_fac, positive = "Yes")
cm_lasso    <- confusionMatrix(class_lasso,    y_test_fac, positive = "Yes")
cm_rf       <- confusionMatrix(class_rf,       y_test_fac, positive = "Yes")
cm_xgb      <- confusionMatrix(class_xgb,      y_test_fac, positive = "Yes")

format_cm <- function(cm, model_name) {
  tbl <- as.data.frame(cm$table) |>
    rename(Predicted = Prediction, Actual = Reference)

  p <- ggplot(tbl, aes(x = Actual, y = Predicted, fill = Freq)) +
    geom_tile(color = "white") +
    geom_text(aes(label = Freq), size = 5) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "#4C78A8") +
    labs(title = paste("Confusion Matrix —", model_name), fill = "Count") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  p
}

p_cm_logistic <- format_cm(cm_logistic, "Logistic Regression")
p_cm_lasso    <- format_cm(cm_lasso,    "LASSO")
p_cm_rf       <- format_cm(cm_rf,       "Random Forest")
p_cm_xgb      <- format_cm(cm_xgb,      "XGBoost")

library(patchwork)

p_cms <- (p_cm_logistic | p_cm_lasso) / (p_cm_rf | p_cm_xgb)
print(p_cms)

ggsave("output/figures/17_confusion_matrices.png", p_cms, width = 9, height = 8, dpi = 150)
```



## Precision-Recall curves

```{r pr-curves}
pr_curve_df <- function(y_true, probs, model_name) {
  thresholds <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.01)
  map_dfr(thresholds, function(t) {
    preds <- factor(ifelse(probs >= t, "Yes", "No"), levels = c("No", "Yes"))
    tibble(
      threshold = t,
      precision = yardstick::precision_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second"),
      recall    = yardstick::sensitivity_vec(y_true, preds, event_level = "second"),
      model     = model_name
    )
  }) |>
    filter(!is.nan(precision))
}

pr_df <- bind_rows(
  pr_curve_df(y_test_fac, prob_logistic, "Logistic regression"),
  pr_curve_df(y_test_fac, prob_lasso,    "LASSO"),
  pr_curve_df(y_test_fac, prob_rf,       "Random forest"),
  pr_curve_df(y_test_fac, prob_xgb,      "XGBoost")
)

baseline_pr <- mean(y_test_fac == "Yes")

p_pr <- ggplot(pr_df, aes(x = recall, y = precision, color = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = baseline_pr, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray60") +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  labs(
    title = "Precision-Recall Curves — Test Set",
    subtitle = sprintf("Dashed line = baseline precision (%.1f%%)", baseline_pr * 100),
    x = "Recall (Sensitivity)",
    y = "Precision",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

print(p_pr)

ggsave("output/figures/18_precision_recall_test.png", p_pr, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 150)
```



## Feature importance for best model

```{r feature-importance-test}
best_model_obj <- switch(best_model_name,
  "Logistic regression" = fit_logistic,
  "LASSO"              = fit_lasso,
  "Random forest"      = fit_rf,
  NULL
)

if (!is.null(best_model_obj)) {
  imp <- varImp(best_model_obj, scale = TRUE)$importance |>
    rownames_to_column("feature") |>
    rename(importance = Overall) |>
    arrange(desc(importance)) |>
    slice_head(n = 20)

  p_imp <- ggplot(imp, aes(x = importance, y = reorder(feature, importance))) +
    geom_col(fill = "#4C78A8") +
    labs(
      title = paste("Top 20 Feature Importances —", best_model_name),
      x = "Scaled importance", y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  print(p_imp)
  ggsave("output/figures/19_feature_importance_best.png", p_imp, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 150)
} else {
  xgb_imp <- xgb.importance(model = fit_xgb) |>
    as_tibble() |>
    slice_head(n = 20)

  p_imp <- ggplot(xgb_imp, aes(x = Gain, y = reorder(Feature, Gain))) +
    geom_col(fill = "#4C78A8") +
    labs(
      title = "Top 20 Feature Importances — XGBoost (Best Model)",
      x = "Gain", y = NULL
    ) +
    theme_minimal()

  print(p_imp)
  ggsave("output/figures/19_feature_importance_best.png", p_imp, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 150)
}
```



## Final model selection

```{r final-selection}
final_model_row <- test_metrics_all |>
  filter(model == best_model_name)

cat("=== Final Selected Model ===\n")
cat("(Selected on validation; test metrics reported below.)\n")
cat("Model:       ", final_model_row$model, "\n")
cat("Test ROC-AUC:", final_model_row$roc_auc, "\n")
cat("Sensitivity: ", final_model_row$sens, "\n")
cat("Specificity: ", final_model_row$spec, "\n")
cat("Precision:   ", final_model_row$precision, "\n")
cat("F1 Score:    ", final_model_row$f1, "\n")

cat("\nAll models — test set:\n")
test_metrics_all
```



## Save evaluation results

```{r save-evaluation}
dir.create("data/processed", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

saveRDS(
  list(
    test_metrics  = test_metrics_all,
    final_model   = final_model_row$model,
    val_metrics   = val_metrics_all,
    confusion_matrices = list(
      logistic = cm_logistic,
      lasso    = cm_lasso,
      rf       = cm_rf,
      xgb      = cm_xgb
    )
  ),
  "data/processed/evaluation.rds"
)

cat("Evaluation results saved to data/processed/evaluation.rds\n")
```
